mentions.note: 100% speculation on recent regulatory approval; only appropriate as small speculative allocation, not as core portfolio holding or primary position.

IPO upsized twice on massive speculative demand, but company is years from profitability with $515.6M annual loss on $30.9M revenue. Valued at $15B+ on pure speculation; only risk capital you can afford to lose entirely.

Discount retail model based on selection (not price) winning while pure dollar stores lose luster; benefits from full-price retailer inventory liquidations; fundamentally different business model driving divergence.
